title: Frontmatter
description: Structured metadata parsed from a template's YAML frontmatter block. Persisted as a JSONB document on the templates table; the top-level title/code/respondent_type/description columns are denormalised from the same value.

title.description: Human-readable display title for the template.

respondent_type.description: Who can be assigned a notation derived from this template.

code.description: Unique stable code identifying this template type within its repository.

confidential.description: Whether the template's content is confidential and should be access-controlled.

description.description: Brief human-readable description of the template's purpose.
